headlines.description: Liverpool beat Wolves 3-1 away on Saturday with two late goals in a win that sent them temporarily to the top of the Premier League table.
headlines.shortLinkText: Liverpool rally to seal comeback win at Wolves

headlines.description: Three late goals by Jhon Duran, Douglas Luiz and Leon Bailey helped Aston Villa stage a fightback to beat Crystal Palace 3-1 on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Villa stage late fightback to overcome Palace

headlines.description: Fulham extended Luton Town's quest for a first Premier League point when Carlos Vinicius scored a second-half winner at Craven Cottage on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sub Vinicius bags Fulham winner to deny Luton

events.name: Brighton & Hove Albion at Manchester United

headlines.description: Manchester United slipped to their third defeat of the Premier League season as an impressive Brighton left Old Trafford with a 3-1 win Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Man Utd woes continue with defeat to Brighton

headlines.description: Tottenham forward Richarlison sparked an astonishing turnaround as his side scored twice in stoppage time to beat Sheffield United 2-1 on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Richarlison inspires Spurs to stoppage-time win

events.name: Manchester City at West Ham United

headlines.description: Jeremy Doku, Bernardo Silva and Erling Haaland scored second-half goals as Manchester City fought back to beat West Ham United 3-1 on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haaland nets again as Man City win at West Ham

headlines.description: A Callum Wilson penalty earned Newcastle United their first victory in four Premier League games as they narrowly beat Brentford 1-0 at St James' Park on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wilson penalty gives Newcastle much-needed win
